overview.Name: Crowdstrike Holdings Inc
overview.Description: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. provides cloud solutions for endpoint and cloud workload protection in the United States, Australia, Germany, India, Israel, Romania, and the United Kingdom. The company is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California.
overview.Address: 206 EAST 9TH STREET, AUSTIN, TX, UNITED STATES, 78701
